NOI_DUNG_VIDEO_ONLY_TEXT.required: Video content (text only) cannot be empty.
META_SEO_KEYWORDS.max: Meta SEO Keywords cannot exceed :max characters.
META_SEO_DESCRIPTION.max: Meta SEO Description cannot exceed :max characters.
VIDEO_NOI_BAT.required: Hot video status cannot be empty.
VIDEO_NOI_BAT.boolean: Hot video status must be true or false.
TRANG_THAI_HOAT_DONG.boolean: Active status must be true or false.
DANH_SACH_HINH_ANH_DAI_DIEN.required: Thumbnail image list cannot be empty.
DANH_SACH_HINH_ANH_DAI_DIEN.array: Thumbnail image list must be an array.
DANH_SACH_HINH_ANH_DAI_DIEN.*.ID.require: Thumbnail image ID cannot be empty.
DANH_SACH_HINH_ANH_DAI_DIEN.*.ID.integer: Thumbnail image ID must be an integer.
DANH_SACH_FILE_DINH_KEM.array: Attachment file list must be an array.
DANH_SACH_FILE_DINH_KEM.*.ID.integer: Attachment file ID must be an integer.
